TermsAndConditions.title: Términos y Condiciones
TermsAndConditions.purposeText: • Ventally enforces community policies through a clear enforcement structure to protect user safety.
TermsAndConditions.firstOffense: • First Offense: Formal warning and reminder of polices.
TermsAndConditions.thirdOffense: • Third Offense: Permanent removal and ban from the platform.
TermsAndConditions.severeViolationsText1: • Immediate permanent removal and referral to law enforcement.
TermsAndConditions.severeViolationsText2: • Ventally reserves the right to bypass steps in extreme cases of harassment, threats, or abuse.
TermsAndConditions.transparencyText: • Ventally may publish anonymized statistics about enforcement actions to promote accountability and trust.
TermsAndConditions.safetyPurposeText: • Ventally is not therapy, but is committed to protecting users in crisis situations such as self-harm, suicide risk, or threats of violence.
TermsAndConditions.crisisProtocol1: • Listeners must escalate immediately if a user discloses self-harm or suicidal thoughts.
TermsAndConditions.crisisProtocol2: • Listeners must end sessions if violence, threats, or abuse are disclosed, and report to moderators.
TermsAndConditions.crisisProtocol3: • Moderators may provide referral information such as 988 (Suicide & Crisis Lifeline) or 211 Connecticut.
TermsAndConditions.limitationsText: • Ventally is a peer-support platform, not a substitute for licensed therapy or emergency services.
TermsAndConditions.confidentialityPurposeText: • Ventally reinforces its anonymous model by prohibiting the sharing of personal, session, or identifying information outside the platform.
TermsAndConditions.prohibitedConduct1: • Recording or disclosing any part of a chat or voice session.
TermsAndConditions.prohibitedConduct2: • Sharing personal information of another user or listener without consent.
TermsAndConditions.prohibitedConduct3: • Using session details for harassment, blackmail, or exploitation.
TermsAndConditions.repercussionsText: • Any breach of confidentiality will result in immediate permanent removal and potential legal action.
TermsAndConditions.bullyingPurposeText: • Ventally maintains a zero-tolerance policy for bullying, intimidation, and abuse.
TermsAndConditions.bullyingProhibitedConduct1: • Verbal abuse, insults, or targeted harassment in chats or voice sessions.
TermsAndConditions.bullyingProhibitedConduct2: • Threatening, stalking, or intimidation of other users.
TermsAndConditions.bullyingProhibitedConduct3: • Group harassment, coordinated bullying, or repeated targeting of individuals.
TermsAndConditions.bullyingReporting1: • Users may report bullying or abuse through the in-app report feature.
TermsAndConditions.bullyingReporting2: • Listeners must escalate incidents immediately to moderators.
TermsAndConditions.bullyingRepercussions1: • Violations may result in warnings, temporary suspension, or permanent ban.
TermsAndConditions.bullyingRepercussions2: • Severe cases may be referred to law enforcement.
TermsAndConditions.antiDiscriminationPurpose1: • Ventally prohibits all forms of discrimination in compliance with Title VII of the Civil Rights Act and Connecticut Human Rights law.
TermsAndConditions.antiDiscriminationPurpose2: • All users and listeners are entitled to equal treatment in all interactions on the platform.
TermsAndConditions.antiDiscriminationProhibitedConduct1: • Discrimination based on race, ethnicity, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability, or nationality.
TermsAndConditions.antiDiscriminationProhibitedConduct2: • Use of slurs, derogatory remarks, or hate speech.
TermsAndConditions.antiDiscriminationProhibitedConduct3: • Exclusionary or demeaning behavior targeting protected characteristics.
TermsAndConditions.antiDiscriminationRepercussionsText: • Any discriminatory conduct will result in immediate investigation and may lead to suspension or permanent removal.
TermsAndConditions.codeOfConductPurpose1: • The Ventally Code of Conduct establishes clear expectations for behavior to ensure a safe, respectful, and supportive environment.
TermsAndConditions.codeOfConductPurpose2: • All users and listeners are required to follow this Code as a condition of participation.
TermsAndConditions.standardRespect: • Respect: Treat all users and listeners with dignity and empathy.
TermsAndConditions.standardNoHarassment: • No Harassment: Sexual harassment, bullying, intimidation, or coercion are strictly prohibited.
TermsAndConditions.standardNoHateSpeech: • No Hate Speech: Discrimination or derogatory remarks based on race, gender, sexual orientation, religion, disability, or nationality are not tolerated.
TermsAndConditions.standardNoExploitation: • No Exploitation: Do not solicit money, favors, or inappropriate personal interactions.
TermsAndConditions.standardNoThreats: • No Threats: Threatening language or incitement of violence will result in immediate removal.
TermsAndConditions.standardConfidentiality: • Confidentiality: Respect the privacy of others; do not share session details outside of Ventally.
TermsAndConditions.reportingMisconduct1: • Users may report misconduct at any time using the in-app 'Report' feature or by contacting Ventally support.
TermsAndConditions.reportingMisconduct2: • All reports will be reviewed promptly and handled confidentially.
TermsAndConditions.reportingMisconduct3: • Listeners are required to end any session where violations occur and escalate reports immediately.
TermsAndConditions.repercussionsZeroTolerance: • Ventally enforces a zero-tolerance approach to misconduct.
TermsAndConditions.repercussionsFirstOffense: • First Offense: Warning and reminder of policies.
TermsAndConditions.repercussionsThirdOffense: • Third Offense: Permanent ban and removal from the platform.
TermsAndConditions.repercussionsSevereViolations: • Severe Violations: Immediate removal, permanent ban, and referral to law enforcement where applicable.
TermsAndConditions.communityCommitmentIntro: • By using Ventally, all users agree to:
TermsAndConditions.communityCommitment1: • Treat others with dignity and respect.
TermsAndConditions.communityCommitment2: • Use Ventally solely for its intended purpose: anonymous emotional support.
TermsAndConditions.communityCommitment3: • Never use the platform to solicit sexual activity or engage in harassment. Harassment will never be tolerated. Users who engage in sexual harassment will be banned and removed immediately to protect the community.
TermsAndConditions.sexualHarassmentPurpose1: • Ventally is committed to maintaining a safe, respectful, and inclusive environment for all users and listeners.
TermsAndConditions.sexualHarassmentPurpose2: • In compliance with Title VII of the Civil Rights Act of 1964 (federal law) and the Connecticut Fair Employment Practices Act (CFEPA, Conn. Gen. Stat. § 46a-60), Ventally prohibits all forms of sexual harassment.
TermsAndConditions.sexualHarassmentDefinition: • Sexual harassment includes any unwelcome sexual advances, requests for sexual favors, or verbal, written, or digital conduct of a sexual nature that creates an intimidating, hostile, or offensive environment, or interferes with another individual's ability to safely use Ventally.
TermsAndConditions.sexualHarassmentExample1: • Sexual jokes, innuendos, or explicit remarks during text or voice interactions.
TermsAndConditions.sexualHarassmentExample2: • Unwanted sexual advances or requests during anonymous sessions.
TermsAndConditions.sexualHarassmentExample3: • Sending or soliciting sexually explicit content (text, audio, emojis, or media).
TermsAndConditions.sexualHarassmentExample4: • Coercion, intimidation, or pressuring another participant for sexual behavior.
TermsAndConditions.sexualHarassmentExample5: • Retaliation against a user or listener for rejecting harassment or filing a report.
TermsAndConditions.scopeText: • This policy applies to all Ventally users and listeners across all features, including.
TermsAndConditions.scopeInApp: • In-app communications (any form of messaging, prompts, or responses).
TermsAndConditions.reportingHarassment1: • Users can report harassment via an in-app 'Report' button or by contacting Ventally support.
TermsAndConditions.reportingHarassment2: • Listeners are required to end sessions immediately if harassment occurs and file a report.
TermsAndConditions.reportingHarassment3: • All reports will be investigated confidentially and promptly by Ventally's safety team.
TermsAndConditions.sexualHarassmentZeroTolerance: • Ventally enforces a zero-tolerance policy for sexual harassment.
TermsAndConditions.sexualHarassmentFirstOffense: • First Offense: Formal warning and reminder of 'community guidelines'.
TermsAndConditions.sexualHarassmentThirdOffense: • Third Offense: Permanent ban and removal from the platform.
TermsAndConditions.sexualHarassmentSevereViolations: • Severe Violations: Immediate permanent removal and referral to law enforcement, including under Connecticut harassment statutes (e.g., Conn. Gen. Stat. §53a-183 Harassment in the Second Degree).
TermsAndConditions.privacyIntro: Ventally ("we," "our," or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy and keeping your personal information secure. This policy explains what we collect, why we collect it, and how we use and protect it. By using our website, app, or services, you agree to this Privacy Policy.
TermsAndConditions.informationWeCollectIntro: We may collect the following types of information:
TermsAndConditions.informationYouProvide1: • Account details (name, email, phone number if provided)
TermsAndConditions.informationYouProvide2: • Subscription/payment information (processed securely by our payment provider — we never store full card details)
TermsAndConditions.informationYouProvide3: • Profile information for listener/venter matching (age range, language preference, availability, demographics)
TermsAndConditions.informationCollectedAutomatically1: • Device details (IP address, operating system, browser type)
TermsAndConditions.informationCollectedAutomatically2: • App usage data (pages viewed, features used, session times)
TermsAndConditions.specialCategoriesText: If you choose to share sensitive information (e.g. health or mental wellness concerns) during sessions, this is processed solely to provide our services and is never used for advertising.
TermsAndConditions.howWeUse2: • Match you with suitable listeners or venters
TermsAndConditions.howWeUse4: • Respond to your inquiries and support requests
TermsAndConditions.howWeUse5: • Enforce our Terms of Use and safety policies
TermsAndConditions.howWeUse6: • Detect and prevent fraud, abuse, or security threats
TermsAndConditions.legalBasesIntro: We process your information based on:
TermsAndConditions.legalBases1: • Contract necessity (to deliver the service you request)
TermsAndConditions.legalBases2: • Legitimate interests (to improve our platform and ensure safety)
TermsAndConditions.legalBases3: • Consent (where required, such as marketing or certain data types)
TermsAndConditions.howWeShareIntro: We do not sell your personal data.
TermsAndConditions.howWeShare1: • Service providers (e.g. payment processors, hosting providers, customer support tools) under strict confidentiality agreements
TermsAndConditions.howWeShare2: • Legal authorities where required by law or to protect safety
TermsAndConditions.howWeShare3: • Successors in business (e.g., in a merger or acquisition, with notice to you)
TermsAndConditions.internationalDataTransfers1: We operate globally. Your information may be processed in countries outside your own, including the US, Canada, UK, and Australia.
TermsAndConditions.internationalDataTransfers2: We use safeguards such as Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) where required.
TermsAndConditions.dataRetention1: We keep your information only as long as needed for the purposes described in this policy or as required by law.
TermsAndConditions.dataRetention2: Account data is deleted within 90 days of a verified deletion request, except where retention is legally required.
TermsAndConditions.yourRightsIntro: Depending on your location, you may have the right to:
TermsAndConditions.yourRights1: • Access a copy of your data
TermsAndConditions.yourRights3: • Delete your data ("right to be forgotten")
TermsAndConditions.yourRightsContact: Requests can be sent to info@ventally.co. We will respond within the timelines required by law.
TermsAndConditions.cookiesAndTrackingText: We use cookies and similar technologies to operate our site, improve performance, and analyze usage. You can adjust cookie settings in your browser.
TermsAndConditions.securityMeasuresText: We use encryption, secure storage, and access controls to protect your data. However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure.
TermsAndConditions.childrensPrivacyText: Ventally is not for users under 18. We do not knowingly collect personal data from minors. If you believe a minor has provided data, contact us for deletion.
TermsAndConditions.thirdPartyLinksText: Our site or app may contain links to other websites. We are not responsible for their privacy practices.
TermsAndConditions.changesToThisPolicyText: We may update this policy from time to time. Updates will be posted here with a revised effective date.
TermsAndConditions.contactUsIntro: If you have questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy or how your data is handled, please contact:

OptionalQuestions.title: A Few Optional Questions
OptionalQuestions.introText: We ask a few optional questions to better understand who you are and what feels supportive to you.
OptionalQuestions.bullet1: Match you with a listener who gets it and understands your perspective.
OptionalQuestions.bullet2: Be mindful of identity, culture and values.
OptionalQuestions.bullet3: Avoid assumptions about what support looks like for you.
OptionalQuestions.infoText1: You're always in control - you can skip any questions, and nothing you share changes your access to Ventally.
OptionalQuestions.infoText2: Your information is private and never shared with other users.

ListenerTraining.title: Capacitación de Oyentes
ListenerTraining.subtitle: Listening With Care: Your Role, Responsibilities, And Boundaries On Ventally
ListenerTraining.courseDescription: This course teaches you to listen with empathy, support others safely, and hold space without judgment - while maintaining healthy boundaries. At Ventally, we believe in the healing power of being seen and heard.
ListenerTraining.missionDescription: Ventally empowers emotional support through empathetic listening and meaningful human connection.
ListenerTraining.complianceIntro:
LISTENER COMPLIANCE AND CONDUCT POLICY
Mandatory Training and Binding Agreement

This training constitutes a mandatory compliance requirement and binding operational agreement for all Ventally Support Guides.

By registering, onboarding, or engaging with ventors on this platform, you acknowledge that you are operating within a controlled support session environment that involves exposure to sensitive psychological disclosures, crisis language, suicidal ideation, abuse reports, and emotionally vulnerable individuals.

Ventally is not a healthcare provider. It does not provide therapy, psychiatric treatment, psychological intervention, or medical services.

Support Guides operate strictly within a non clinical peer support capacity.

Failure to comply with platform policies, safety protocols, confidentiality standards, or escalation requirements will result in immediate and permanent removal from the platform and may subject the Support Guide to additional legal review where applicable.
ListenerTraining.complianceAgreement: I acknowledge that this training constitutes a binding compliance agreement.

complianceModules.title: Platform Mission and Scope of Support Guide Role
complianceModules.content:
Ventally operates as a structured support session platform designed to provide individuals with a confidential space to express emotional distress without diagnosis, treatment, or clinical intervention.

Support Guides serve as peer support session providers only.

Support Guides are authorized to:
• Provide empathetic listening
• Offer emotional validation
• Maintain supportive presence
• Encourage professional resources when appropriate

Support Guides are not authorized to provide any form of mental health treatment, intervention, or guidance beyond support session.

Support Guides are not functioning as therapists, psychologists, psychiatrists, counselors, crisis responders, or licensed social workers within the scope of this platform.

Support Guides are not responsible for ventor mental health outcomes, emotional stabilization, crisis resolution, or behavioral change.
complianceModules.checkboxLabel: I acknowledge and accept the defined scope limitations of my role.

complianceModules.title: Legal and Ethical Practice Boundaries
complianceModules.content:
Support Guides are strictly prohibited from engaging in clinical, diagnostic, or medical conduct while operating on the platform.

Prohibited conduct includes but is not limited to:
• Providing therapy or counseling
• Diagnosing psychological disorders
• Labeling mental health conditions
• Suggesting medications
• Advising medication discontinuation
• Offering treatment plans
• Recommending coping interventions as treatment
• Interpreting psychiatric symptoms
• Providing medical or psychological opinions

Even informal statements that imply diagnosis or treatment constitute policy violations.

Unauthorized clinical guidance creates risk of psychological harm, treatment interference, and legal liability exposure.
complianceModules.checkboxLabel: I acknowledge that clinical guidance of any kind is prohibited.

complianceModules.title: Confidentiality and Data Protection Compliance
complianceModules.content:
Confidentiality is a mandatory and legally binding requirement of Support Guide participation.

All Support Guides enter into a confidentiality agreement prior to engaging with users.

Support Guides are strictly prohibited from:
• Capturing screenshots
• Recording audio sessions
• Saving chat transcripts
• Copying user messages
• Sharing session content externally
• Discussing ventor disclosures with third parties
• Publishing anonymized content
• Attempting to identify users
• Contacting users outside the platform

Confidentiality applies across all personal, professional, and digital environments without exception.

Violation of confidentiality will result in permanent removal and may result in legal escalation depending on severity.
complianceModules.checkboxLabel: I acknowledge and agree to all confidentiality and data protection requirements.

complianceModules.title: Communication Conduct and Interaction Standards
complianceModules.content:
Support Guides are required to demonstrate emotionally competent, non directive communication at all times.

Support Guides must utilize:
• Active listening
• Emotional validation
• Reflective paraphrasing
• Tone neutrality

Support Guides must not:
• Provide unsolicited advice
• Minimize emotional disclosures
• Redirect conversations toward personal experiences
• Offer solutions in place of validation

Support Guides are required to maintain emotional neutrality while supporting ventor expression.
complianceModules.checkboxLabel: I acknowledge the required communication conduct standards.

complianceModules.title: Management of Emotional Distress Presentations
complianceModules.content:
Ventors may present in heightened emotional states, including but not limited to panic, grief, trauma expression, and emotional destabilization.

Support Guides are authorized to:
• Maintain calm presence
• Validate distress
• Encourage external support resources

Support Guides are not authorized to:
• Stabilize psychological crises
• Provide mental health intervention
• Deliver coping treatment
• Assume responsibility for emotional outcomes
complianceModules.checkboxLabel: I acknowledge the limits of my responsibility when supporting distressed ventors.

complianceModules.title: Crisis Escalation & 988
complianceModules.content:
Ventally enforces a zero tolerance policy regarding failure to escalate suicidal risk.

If a ventor expresses suicidal ideation, intent to self harm, or statements indicating they do not wish to live, Support Guides are required to take immediate escalation action.

This includes:
• Referring the ventor to the 988 Suicide and Crisis Lifeline
• Encouraging connection to emergency support services
• Utilizing the in app report and escalation tools
• Safely disengaging from the session if necessary

Suicidal language may include, but is not limited to:
• “I don’t want to be here anymore.”
• “I’m thinking about ending my life.”
• “I have a plan.”
• “Everyone would be better off without me.”
• “I don’t see the point in living.”

Any statement indicating self harm risk must be treated as a crisis escalation event.

ENFORCEMENT STANDARD
Failure to escalate suicidal risk is considered a severe violation of Support Guide safety policy.
If a Support Guide fails to refer to 988, continues the session without referral, attempts independent crisis management, ignores disclosures, or fails to report the interaction, the Support Guide will be subject to immediate permanent removal from the platform.
Removal is final and non appealable.
complianceModules.checkboxLabel: I acknowledge and accept the crisis escalation enforcement policy.

complianceModules.title: Professional Boundary Enforcement
complianceModules.content:
Support Guides are prohibited from engaging in personal, romantic, or off platform relationships with ventors.

Prohibited conduct includes:
• Flirtation
• Romantic dialogue
• Meetup arrangements
• Exchange of personal contact information
• Social media connections
• Off platform communication

Boundary violations compromise user safety and platform integrity.
complianceModules.checkboxLabel: I acknowledge and agree to all professional boundary requirements.

complianceModules.title: Support Guide Psychological Fitness and Burnout Responsibility
complianceModules.content:
Support Guides are responsible for monitoring their emotional capacity to engage safely.

Support Guides must:
• Limit session volume
• Take restorative breaks
• Pause engagement when overwhelmed

Support Guides experiencing emotional fatigue must disengage rather than continue impaired listening.
complianceModules.checkboxLabel: I acknowledge my responsibility to maintain psychological fitness while serving as a Support Guide.

complianceModules.title: Final Binding Compliance Confirmation
complianceModules.content:
By proceeding, you certify that you have read, understood, and agreed to all platform policies, including confidentiality, escalation, conduct, and scope limitations.

You acknowledge that violations may result in immediate and permanent removal from the Ventally platform.
complianceModules.checkboxLabel: I certify full compliance and agreement with all Support Guide policies.

ListenerTraining.agreeAllTerms: Please agree to all terms and conditions to proceed.

ListenerTermsAndConditions.title: Terms & Polices
ListenerTermsAndConditions.signaturePlaceholder: Tap here to add your digital signature

ListenerLiabilityWaiver.title: Ventally Listener Liability Waiver
ListenerLiabilityWaiver.introText1: This Liability Waiver ("Waiver") is entered into by and between Ventally Limited Liability Company, a corporation duly organized and existing under the laws of its jurisdiction, with its principal place of business in the State of Connecticut (hereinafter referred to as "Ventally" or the "Company"), and the undersigned individual ("Listener"). Collectively, Ventally and the Listener shall be referred to as the "Parties."

sections.title: 1. ASSUMPTION OF RISK
bullets: The Support Guide expressly assumes full responsibility for all risks associated with their engagement, including but not limited to emotional fatigue, secondary trauma, reputational exposure, and any psychological discomfort resulting from user interactions.
The Support Guide acknowledges that they are solely responsible for determining their own mental and emotional readiness and ongoing capacity to perform services in a safe and competent manner.
The Support Guide agrees to promptly notify Ventally if they experience any mental, emotional, or physical condition that may impair their ability to fulfill their duties safely or ethically.

sections.title: 2. NO MEDICAL OR MENTAL HEALTH CLAIMS
bullets: The Support Guide confirms that they are not licensed to provide mental health care, and shall not represent themselves as a medical, psychological, or clinical professional.
The Support Guide acknowledges that Ventally is a non-clinical support platform and that all interactions are designed solely for peer support purposes.

sections.title: 3. RELEASE AND WAIVER OF CLAIMS
bullets: To the maximum extent permitted by law, the Support Guide hereby fully and irrevocably releases, waives, and discharges Ventally and its directors, officers, employees, contractors, agents, successors, and assigns from any and all claims arising out of or related to the Support Guide's participation on the platform.
This release includes, but is not limited to, claims for personal injury, emotional distress, defamation, negligence, or any other loss or damage incurred by the Support Guide.

signatures.title: ACKNOWLEDGMENT AND SIGNATURE
signatures.text: By signing below, the Support Guide affirms that they have reviewed and understood the foregoing Liability Waiver, and agrees to be legally bound by its terms.

ListenerLiabilityWaiver.introText2: By executing this Waiver, the Listener affirms that they have carefully read, understood, and voluntarily agreed to the terms and conditions contained herein, which govern the Listener's access to and participation in the Ventally platform and the provision of non-clinical, peer-based emotional support services.
ListenerLiabilityWaiver.sectionTitle: 1. VOLUNTARY PARTICIPATION AND ASSUMPTION OF RISK
ListenerLiabilityWaiver.bulletPoint1: • The Listener affirms that their participation on the Ventally platform is entirely voluntary and may involve exposure to emotionally sensitive, distressing, or triggering subject matter shared by users.
ListenerLiabilityWaiver.bulletPoint2: • The Listener expressly assumes full responsibility for all risks associated with their engagement, including but not limited to emotional fatigue, secondary trauma, reputational exposure, and any psychological discomfort resulting from user interactions.

ListenerAgreement.title: Ventally Listener Agreement
ListenerAgreement.introText1: This This Listener Agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into by and between Ventally Limited Liability Company, a Connecticut limited liability company and provider of mental health peer-support services ("Ventally," "we," "us," or the "Company"), and the undersigned individual ("Listener," "you") who has been accepted to serve as a trained Listener on the Ventally platform.

subsections.title: Provision of Peer Support
subsections.text: You agree to provide active listening, emotional validation, and non-clinical peer support session to users of the Ventally platform.

subsections.title: Independent Contractor Status
subsections.text: You acknowledge that you are providing services as an independent contractor and not as an employee.

subsections.title: Prohibitions on Medical Advice
subsections.text: You shall not represent yourself as a licensed therapist or medical professional. You are strictly prohibited from providing medical, clinical, or professional advice.

subsections.title: Boundary Enforcement
subsections.text: You shall not exchange personal contact details, engage in romantic interactions, or arrange in-person meetings with users.

subsections.title: Confidentiality of User Information
subsections.text: You agree not to record, store, replicate, or disclose any information obtained from users during a session.

signatures.title: SIGNATURES
signatures.text: By signing below, the Parties acknowledge that they have read, understood, and agree to be legally bound by the terms of this Agreement.

ListenerAgreement.nonClinicalText: You acknowledge and agree that your role as a Listener on the Ventally platform is limited exclusively to providing empathetic, non-clinical emotional support. You are not a licensed therapist, counselor, crisis responder, or medical or legal professional, and shall not purport to be one.
ListenerAgreement.prohibitedText: You expressly agree not to provide any form of diagnosis, treatment, therapeutic intervention, medical, legal, financial, or relationship advice under any circumstances. Any such behavior shall constitute a material breach of this Agreement.
ListenerAgreement.noEmploymentText: You acknowledge and agree that your

PaymentTermsAcknowledgment.title: Ventally Payment Terms Acknowledgment
PaymentTermsAcknowledgment.introText1: This Payment Terms Acknowledgment ("Acknowledgment") is entered into by and between Ventally Limited Liability Company, a corporation duly organized and existing under the laws of its jurisdiction, with its principal place of business in the State of Connecticut ("Ventally" or the "Company"), and the undersigned individual ("Listener"). Ventally and the Listener are hereinafter collectively referred to as the "Parties."

sections.title: 1. INDEPENDENT CONTRACTOR STATUS
bullets: The Support Guide acknowledges and agrees that their engagement with Ventally is that of an independent contractor.
The Support Guide is solely responsible for all taxes and withholdings.

sections.title: 2. PAYMENT STRUCTURE
bullets: Compensation is strictly performance-based and calculated according to verified sessions completed.
Ventally provides no assurance or guarantee of any minimum earnings.

signatures.title: ACKNOWLEDGMENT AND SIGNATURE
signatures.text: By signing below, the Support Guide affirms that they have read and understood this Payment Terms Acknowledgment.

PaymentTermsAcknowledgment.introText2: By executing this Acknowledgment, the Listener expressly affirms that they have thoroughly reviewed, fully understood, and voluntarily accepted the terms, policies, and procedures governing compensation and financial obligations applicable to their engagement as an independent contractor on the Ventally platform.
PaymentTermsAcknowledgment.bulletPoint1: • The Listener acknowledges and agrees that their engagement with Ventally is that of an independent contractor. Nothing in this Acknowledgment shall be construed to establish an employment, agency, fiduciary, or partnership relationship between the Parties.
PaymentTermsAcknowledgment.bulletPoint2: • The Listener is solely and exclusively responsible for the reporting and payment of all applicable taxes, withholdings, levies, and other government-imposed charges related to the compensation received from Ventally.

ListenerNDA.title: Ventally Listener Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA)

sections.title: 1. CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION
sections.text: Confidential Information includes all non-public information disclosed by Ventally or users, including business strategies, user data, and session content.

sections.title: 2. NON-DISCLOSURE OBLIGATIONS
bullets: Use Confidential Information solely for providing services.
Maintain strict confidentiality and not disclose to third parties.
Prevent unauthorized access through reasonable security measures.

signatures.title: SIGNATURE
signatures.text: The Parties have executed this Non-Disclosure Agreement as of the Effective Date.

ListenerNDA.introText1: This Non-Disclosure Agreement ("Agreement") is made and entered into by and between Ventally Limited Liability Company, a corporation duly organized and existing under the laws of its jurisdiction, with its principal place of business in the State of Connecticut ("Ventally," "Company," or "Disclosing Party"), and the undersigned individual ("Listener," "you") who has been selected and engaged as a Listener on the Ventally platform ("Receiving Party"). Ventally and the Listener shall be referred to as the "Parties."
ListenerNDA.bulletPoint1: This Agreement establishes the legal obligations of the Listener to maintain the confidentiality of proprietary, sensitive, and confidential information disclosed by users and other participants on the Ventally platform. The Parties acknowledge that maintaining the confidentiality of such information is essential to protect the integrity and trust of the platform. Listeners are expected to maintain the highest level of discretion.
ListenerNDA.bulletPoint2: "Confidential Information" shall mean all non-public, proprietary, sensitive, and confidential valuable information disclosed by Ventally to the Listener, whether orally, in writing, electronically, or in any other form.

ListenerCodeOfConduct.title: Ventally Listener Code of Conduct
ListenerCodeOfConduct.introText1: This Listener Code of Conduct ("Code") establishes the mandatory standards of professional conduct required of all individuals who have been accepted and engaged as Listeners on the Ventally platform. Compliance with this Code is a binding condition of participation in the Ventally platform. Listeners are expected to maintain the highest level of professionalism, empathy, and ethical conduct in all interactions.

sections.title: 1. PROFESSIONALISM & NEUTRALITY
bullets: Support Guides shall maintain a professional demeanor, providing non-judgmental peer support.
Support Guides must remain neutral and refrain from imposing personal beliefs.

sections.title: 2. SAFETY & ZERO TOLERANCE
bullets: Harassment, discrimination, or sexual impropriety will result in immediate removal.
Support Guides shall not provide professional medical or legal advice.

signatures.title: ACKNOWLEDGMENT
signatures.text: By signing below, the Support Guide agrees to adhere to this Code of Conduct.

ListenerCodeOfConduct.bulletPoint1: • Listeners shall maintain the highest levels of professional demeanor, integrity, and ethical conduct. Listeners are expected to act with empathy, patience, and active listening skills during all interactions.
ListenerCodeOfConduct.bulletPoint2: • Listeners must not misrepresent their role, qualifications, credentials, or authority to provide professional mental health or medical advice.
ListenerCodeOfConduct.bulletPoint3: • Listeners shall conduct themselves in a manner that upholds the dignity, trust, and reputation of Ventally at all times. Such conduct includes, but is not limited to, respectful communication, maintaining professional boundaries, and adhering to all platform policies and procedures.

FAQ.subtitle: No dudes en contactarnos si tienes alguna duda.

items.title: What Is Ventally?
items.description:
Ventally is a safe, anonymous space where you can talk or text with trained Support Guides whenever you need to let something out — no judgment, no pressure.

Q. Is This A Therapy

A. No. Ventally is not a replacement for therapy. We’re support session from real people trained in active listening, not licensed clinicians.

Q. What If I Need Urgent Help

A. If you’re in crisis, please contact a licensed mental health professional or emergency services. We’re here for support, but we’re not a crisis hotline.

items.title: What Is A Support Guide & How Do I Become One
items.description:
Our Support Guides are everyday people who’ve been trained to provide support session, encouragement, and validation. They’re not therapists — just great Support Guides who care.

Visit our Become a Support Guide page, apply, complete our training, and start earning while making an impact.

Q: Do I need experience?

A: No formal experience is required — just empathy, reliability, and the willingness to complete our training.

Q: Is this paid?

A: Yes. Support Guides earn money per call or text session. Payments are processed weekly or biweekly via Stripe.

Q: Do I have to use my real name?

A: No. You’ll operate under a Support Guide alias and never share personal details. We value your safety and privacy too.

items.title: What Is A Venter & Questions About Venting
items.description:
A Venter is anyone using the Ventally app to release what’s on their mind — stress, frustration, loneliness, or even joy — in a safe, anonymous space. They’re not patients or clients. They’re people seeking confidential peer support and emotional validation.

Q: Can I stay anonymous?

A: Yes. You don’t have to share your real name, photo, or any identifying info. Ventally is built for emotional privacy and digital safety.

Q: When can I vent?

A: 24/7. If Support Guides are online, you’ll get matched instantly. If not, we’ll notify you as soon as one’s available.

Q: How much does it cost?

A: You can pay per session or choose a monthly subscription. We also offer free trials and giveaway sessions during launch!

items.title: General Questions
items.description:
Q: Is Ventally available worldwide?

A: We’re currently launching in the U.S., with plans to expand to Canada, the UK, EU, Australia and the Caribbean. International users can join the waitlist.

Q: Can I purchase prepaid access for someone else?

A: Yes. You can buy a prepaid session or subscription for another person through our prepaid access options in the app.

Q: How do you keep conversations safe?

A: Every session is monitored for abusive behavior. We have community guidelines, reporting tools, and a moderation team that ensures Ventally remains a supportive space.

Q: How do I contact support?

A: Email us at info@ventally.co or visit the Contact Us page. We typically respond within 24–48 hours.

DeleteAccount.title: Delete Your Account
DeleteAccount.warning: Deleting your account is permanent and cannot be undone.
DeleteAccount.description:
Deleting your account will permanently remove your profile, messages, session history, and all associated data from Ventally. This action cannot be undone. Any active subscriptions, credits, or pending wallet balances will be forfeited upon deletion.

If you have an active subscription, you must cancel it before deleting your account. Deleting your account does not automatically stop billing, and you may continue to be charged by your app store provider.

Enter your password below to confirm and proceed with permanent account deletion.
DeleteAccount.confirmDelete: Would you like to delete this account?

EditProfile.title: Editar Perfil
EditProfile.optionalQuestionsBody1:
Hacemos algunas preguntas opcionales para entender mejor qué te resulta de apoyo.

Tus respuestas guían una experiencia estructurada y moderada.

Tus respuestas nos ayudan a:
• Adaptar tu experiencia de apoyo a lo que sientas adecuado
• Respetar la identidad, cultura y valores
• Reducir suposiciones sobre tus preferencias de apoyo

Siempre tienes el control de omitir cualquier pregunta y nada de lo que compartas cambia tu acceso a Ventally.
EditProfile.optionalQuestionsBody2: Tu información es privada y nunca se comparte con otros usuarios.
EditProfile.optionalQuestionsFooter: Diseñado para un uso respetuoso y basado en pautas
